items.name: The Aerostrix
items.role: Bends fortune so a Fell's strike lands true.
items.initial: When a Fell makes an attack, that attack is a Lucky Roll.
items.branch1: The target's Evasion becomes 0 against that attack.
items.branch2: The Fell adds the lorebound owner's Precision to its own for that attack.
items.crown1: Add a second Lucky die to that attack.
items.crown2: The target's Evade against that attack is an Unlucky Roll.

items.name: The Alkagoo
items.role: Distills a spent spell or ability into a potion or tablet to use later.
items.initial: When a target's Tier 1 spell or ability resolves, copy it into the lorebound owner's inventory as a potion for a spell or a tablet for an ability.
items.branch1: Upgrade the capture to any spell or ability of your choosing in the next highest Tier.
items.crown1: Upgrade the capture to any spell or ability of your choosing in the next highest Tier.

items.name: The Aquafin
items.role: Robs a foe of the Charge its attack would earn.
items.initial: When a target lands an attack, prevent it from gaining a Charge.
items.branch1: Give the prevented Charge to the Fell that was attacked.
items.branch2: Give the prevented Charge to the lorebound owner.
items.crown1: Remove all additional Charges from the target.
items.crown2: Restore the lorebound owner to maximum Charges.

items.name: The Boreal
items.role: Softens a physical blow and turns what it spares into vitality.
items.initial: When a physical attack hits a Fell, prevent Base damage equal to the lorebound owner's Vigor.
items.branch1: Convert the prevented damage into Temporary Vitality for the lorebound owner.
items.branch2: Convert the prevented damage into Temporary Vitality for the Fell that was hit.
items.crown1: The prevented damage restores Current Vitality first, and overflow is converted to Temporary Vitality.
items.crown2: Prevent and convert double the Base damage.

items.name: The Cawmarch
items.role: Scours an Affliction from a Fell before it sets in.
items.initial: When a Fell gains an Affliction, negate it.
items.branch1: Apply the negated Affliction to the attacker.
items.branch2: Store the Affliction as a Glyph in the lorebound owner's inventory.
items.crown1: Apply a copy of the Affliction to every enemy in the lorebound's Mobility range.
items.crown2: Remove every Affliction from that Fell.

items.name: The Drakelith
items.role: Turns any roll a Fell makes into a stroke of luck.
items.initial: When a Fell makes any roll, that roll is a Lucky Roll.
items.branch1: Add a second Lucky die to the roll.
items.branch2: If that roll is a Fellmark, double its effect.
items.crown1: Every Fell in the lorebound's Mobility range becomes Lucky (its rolls are Lucky Rolls until it takes damage).
items.crown2: At the end of the battle, every Fell in the lorebound's Mobility range adds a Lucky die to their treasure rolls.

items.name: The Felionis
items.role: Sours hostile magic aimed at a Fell so it falters.
items.initial: When an enemy's spell targets a Fell, the spell is an Unlucky Roll.
items.branch1: If the spell still succeeds, prevent Bonus damage equal to the lorebound owner's Resistance.
items.branch2: If the spell fails, it resolves on the caster instead.
items.crown1: If the spell fails, the caster gains the Disrupted Affliction (its spells automatically fail unless a Fellmark is rolled).
items.crown2: Every enemy in the lorebound's Mobility range gains the Unlucky Affliction (all its rolls become Unlucky).

items.name: The Grimgrit
items.role: Answers a blow against a Fell with one of its own.
items.initial: When a Fell is hit, deal Base damage to the attacker.
items.branch1: Also apply a Combat Effect of your choice to the attacker.
items.branch2: Deal Bonus damage to the attacker as well.
items.crown1: Deal the damage to every enemy in the lorebound's Mobility range.

items.name: The Hexarach
items.role: Makes a Fell's spell take hold without fail.
items.initial: When a Fell casts a spell, it automatically succeeds.
items.branch1: Swap the spell for another spell of your choosing in the same Tier.
items.branch2: Duplicate the spell's effect onto another target.
items.crown1: A second spell of your choosing in the same Tier is also cast and automatically succeeds.
items.crown2: Spread the spell's effect to any targets you choose within the lorebound's Mobility range.

items.name: The Lumitoad
items.role: Strips a foe of its React the moment it commits to an Act.
items.initial: When an enemy uses its Act, it loses its React.
items.branch1: The enemy also gains a Combat Effect at random.
items.branch2: Give the lost React to a Fell within the lorebound's Mobility range.
items.crown1: The enemy's Act is negated entirely.
items.crown2: Apply an Affliction at random to the enemy.

items.name: The Mordel
items.role: Shrugs off a blow's bite and sends it back at the striker.
items.initial: When a physical attack hits a Fell, prevent Bonus damage equal to the lorebound owner's Durability.
items.branch1: Deal the prevented damage to the attacker.
items.branch2: After the Bonus is prevented, also prevent the Base damage.
items.crown1: Deal the prevented damage to every enemy in the lorebound's Mobility range.
items.crown2: Prevent all of the incoming damage instead.

items.name: The Runesteed
items.role: Breaks a Combat Effect off a Fell and wards what comes next.
items.initial: When a Fell gains a Combat Effect, negate it.
items.branch1: Apply the negated Combat Effect to the one who added it.
items.branch2: Heal the targeted Fell's Vitality equal to the lorebound owner's Vigor.
items.crown1: Apply Manifested (create a temporary barrier) in an empty space adjacent to the target.
items.crown2: The targeted Fell may move up to its Mobility.

items.name: The Slipfang
items.role: Slips a Fell out of an attack's path.
items.initial: When a Fell rolls to Evade, that roll is a Lucky Roll.
items.branch1: The attacker's Precision becomes 0 for that attack.
items.branch2: The Fell adds the lorebound owner's Evasion to its own for that attack.
items.crown1: Add a second Lucky die to that Evade.
items.crown2: The attacker's attack roll against that Fell is an Unlucky Roll.

items.name: The Solmera
items.role: Burns any foe that dares strike a Fell.
items.initial: When an enemy attacks a Fell, deal 1d6 Base damage to the attacker.
items.branch1: Apply a Combat Effect at random to the attacker.
items.crown1: Apply the Ignited Affliction to the attacker.
items.crown2: Apply the Frozen Affliction to the attacker.

items.name: The Thistlewing
items.role: Snares a spent spell or ability into a rune or trap.
items.initial: When a target's Tier 1 spell or ability resolves, create a rune for the spell or a trap for the ability in the lorebound owner's inventory.
items.branch1: Upgrade the capture to any spell or ability of your choosing in the next highest Tier.
items.branch2: Create a second copy of the rune or trap.
items.crown1: Upgrade the capture to any spell or ability of your choosing in the next highest Tier.
items.crown2: Create a second copy of the rune or trap.

items.name: The Vixel
items.role: Shifts a targeted Fell out of harm's way.
items.initial: When a Fell is targeted, apply a Movement Combat Effect of your choice to that Fell.
items.branch1: Also apply the Combat Effect to one other target within range.
items.crown1: Apply a second Combat Effect at random to the enemy targeting the Fell.
items.crown2: Remove an Affliction at random from the targeted Fell.

items.name: The Worgar
items.role: Reaps a Skyvault Shard from every wound a Fell takes.
items.initial: When a Fell takes damage from an attack or spell, manifest a Skyvault Shard in the lorebound owner's inventory.
items.branch1: Heal that Fell's Vitality equal to the lorebound owner's Renewal.
items.branch2: Manifest a second shard in the targeted Fell's inventory.
items.crown1: Double the number of shards manifested.
items.crown2: Destroy any number of Skyvault Shards and deal Base damage to the attacker for each one destroyed.

items.name: The Xenophis
items.role: Wraps a wounded Fell in shadow, beyond an enemy's sight.
items.initial: When a Fell takes damage from any source, it becomes Obscured (enemies cannot see or target it until it deals damage or the end of its next round).
items.branch1: Apply a Movement Combat Effect of your choice to that Fell.
items.branch2: Deal the damage taken back to the source.
items.crown1: Also apply Obscured to another Fell within the lorebound's Mobility range.
items.crown2: Apply a second Movement Combat Effect to the Fell.
